name: @block-agent/app-base
description: base BlockApp (formerly actions, with the former tools app merged in): the unified action/observation ledger (agent command results + external inputs) PLUS the agent's built-in tool commands (read_file / grep / bash / http_request), so the agent sees its successes, not only its failures.
$exports_note: exports point at .ts SOURCE (no build). Importers use '@block-agent/app-base/manifest.js'.

blockAgent.summary: 动作/观察统一台账 + 内置工具（read_file / grep / bash / http_request）：把智能体每条命令结果与每条外部输入记入有界窗口 + 完整 jsonl，让智能体既看到失败也看到成功。
